data.content: Implementation complete on feat/foolery-6aaf (27cf50d62f60). VersionBadge is now a clickable button wrapped in a Popover. Clicking triggers checkForUpdates() which fetches /api/version?force=1. Popover shows: (1) 'Checking for updates…' spinner during fetch, (2) 'Latest version installed' with green check when up-to-date, (3) 'Update now to v{version}' actionable Button when update available — clicking copies 'foolery update' to clipboard, (4) error state with Retry button. The checkForUpdates function is exported and tested with 6 unit tests covering all branches: update-available, up-to-date, HTTP error, null latestVersion edge case, abort signal passthrough, and network failure propagation. All quality gates pass: 0 lint errors, clean typecheck, 2257 tests passing, build succeeds.
